name: @vanillagreen/pi-flightdeck
description: Optional Pi status shell for the flightdeck skill: owner-scoped mini-dashboard, pause banner, notifications, and /flightdeck focus/open integration for the Rust app.

settings.label: Enable Flightdeck Pi status shell
settings.description: Register /flightdeck focus/open command, owner-scoped persistent mini-dashboard, and pause banner. User-hidden widget state suppresses inline dashboard/banner until explicit toggle-in.

settings.label: Glyph style
settings.description: Glyphs for vstack-owned UI chrome. Unicode is the default; ASCII uses plain box/status/separator characters for terminal compatibility. pi-tool-renderer's global override wins when set.

settings.label: Dashboard cycle shortcut
settings.description: Keyboard shortcut that cycles the persistent mini-dashboard widget and restores the last visible mode when toggled back in. Use none to disable.

settings.label: Show mini-dashboard widget
settings.description: Render a persistent sessions mini-dashboard above the owner editor when a Flightdeck session is active. User-hidden state blocks automatic reopen until explicit toggle-in.

settings.label: Dashboard visibility
settings.description: Where the persistent mini-dashboard widget may render: owner pane only (default), any pane in the same tmux session, or always when state is readable. Child panes remain suppressed.

settings.label: Dashboard default state
settings.description: Initial dashboard state at session start; settings changes do not reopen a user-hidden widget mid-session.

settings.label: Dashboard max sessions
settings.description: Maximum tracked-session rows shown in the persistent mini-dashboard widget. Existing dashboardMaxItems settings continue to apply; only the label changed.

settings.label: Dashboard stale-after (min)
settings.description: Treat the dashboard as stale (suppress session tree, show a one-line hint) when the daemon is dead AND the most recent session poll is older than this many minutes. Set 0 to disable stale detection and always render leftover state as live.

settings.label: Show pause banner
settings.description: Render a high-contrast banner above the editor whenever flightdeck master sets paused_for_user, unless the inline widget is user-hidden. Banner clears automatically when master resumes.

settings.label: Terminal bell on pause
settings.description: Ring the terminal bell once when paused_for_user is first detected.

settings.label: Refresh interval
settings.description: How often (ms) the dashboard and banner re-read flightdeck state files.

settings.label: Legacy tree connector style
settings.description: Legacy fallback for tree connectors when glyphStyle is unset and pi-tool-renderer globalGlyphStyleOverride is inherit. Prefer Glyph style for all UI chrome.

settings.label: Daemon state dir override
settings.description: Override for FD_STATE_DIR resolution. Leave empty to use the same resolution flightdeck-daemon uses ($XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/flightdeck or /tmp/flightdeck-$UID). Daemon tuning env vars such as FD_OC_BACKOFF_MAX_SEC are configured outside this read-only extension.

settings.label: Master state dir (project-relative)
settings.description: Directory inside the project root that holds the flightdeck master state file. Matches FLIGHTDECK_STATE_DIR (default tmp).

resources.name: /flightdeck
resources.description: Focus the Flightdeck Rust app, or launch it if missing.

resources.name: /flightdeck:toggle
resources.description: Cycle the persistent flightdeck mini-dashboard widget.

author: vanillagreen
